title: Best Paper Award — NRSC 2014
description: A milestone in academic research, supervision, or community contribution in communications engineering.
fullDescription: Best Paper Award at the 31st National Radio Science Conference (NRSC) for work on carrier frequency offset correction in OFDM systems.

title: Supervisor — 6th Rank, UAVC (ICMTC 2024)
description: A milestone in academic research, supervision, or community contribution in communications engineering.
fullDescription: Supervised the team ranked 6th in the Unmanned Aerial Vehicles Competition (UAVC) at the 8th International Competition of the Military Technical College (ICMTC 2024), Cairo, Egypt.

title: Supervisor — 10th Rank, ITC-EGYPT 2023
description: A milestone in academic research, supervision, or community contribution in communications engineering.
fullDescription: Supervised the team ranked 10th over 520 contestants at the International Telecommunications Conference ITC-EGYPT 2023, Air Defense College, Alexandria, Egypt.

title: Supervisor — 8th Rank, EgSA Satellite Project 2022
description: A milestone in academic research, supervision, or community contribution in communications engineering.
fullDescription: Supervised the team ranked 8th over 56 contestants in the 'Satellite Universities Project' at the Egyptian Space Agency (EgSA), Cairo, Egypt.
